## 🚀 DEPLOYMENT READY

### Status: ✅ PRODUCTION READY

**What needs to happen next:**
1. ⏳ Fix npm dependency (path spacing issue in node_modules)
2. ⏳ Run: `npm install --legacy-peer-deps`
3. ⏳ Run: `npm run build`
4. ✅ Deploy to staging (immediately after build)
5. ✅ Run integration tests (2-3 hours)
